sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82580" key="perixw/rhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιχώρ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n82580.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rotation</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anaxag.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
